title: Hazard & Warning Symbols: Copy & Paste ☢ ☣ ⚠ Danger Signs
meta_description: Copy and paste hazard and warning symbols — radioactive, biohazard, warning triangle, high voltage, skull and crossbones, and alert marks. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
hero_tagline: Radioactive, biohazard, high-voltage, and warning signs plus the alert marks that go with them. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
intro: Hazard symbols flag danger at a glance. This library gathers the radioactive, biohazard, and skull-and-crossbones marks, the warning and caution signs, the electrical and high-voltage glyphs, and the exclamation marks used for alerts — every one a plain Unicode character you can copy into labels, docs, and messages.

sections.label: Toxic
sections.intro: The classic danger signs for radiation, biological hazards, and poison.

sections.label: Warning
sections.intro: General warning marks and the high-voltage and electrical hazard signs.

sections.label: Alerts
sections.intro: Exclamation and cross marks used to draw attention to a danger or error.

related.title: Traffic & Road Sign Symbols
related.desc: Road, traffic, and transit signs to copy and paste.

related.title: Recycle & Environment Symbols
related.desc: Recycling, eco, and environmental marks in Unicode.

related.title: Special Characters
related.desc: Unique Unicode symbols with individual meaning and standalone appeal.
